judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent computed an average rating per book and then averaged those per decade (groupby num_id then groupby decade), adding an extra averaging step not requested by the query, so even with correct data the plan would yield a different top decade (1980s) than the ground truth (2020).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After querying books_info and review tables, the agent merged reviews to books using an exact equality join on purchase_id = book_id in execute_python despite the IDs having different formats (e.g., "purchaseid_186" vs "bookid_186"), resulting in no matches and an empty eligible set, so it incorrectly concluded no decade meets the requirement.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After extracting years from books_info.details and querying review.purchase_id/ratings, the agent performed an exact inner join on purchase_id = book_id (execute_python) which yielded zero merged rows (debug showed merged_rows = 0), then prematurely gave up instead of applying the required fuzzy join, resulting in no computed decade answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly queried books_info and reviews but, in execute_python, treated the stored file path for the large review result as JSON (evidenced by the DataFrame constructor error and then JSONDecodeError in call_5tACNu0yJsoq1rQ6GNPmao2H), so it never loaded the data, aborted the computation, and incorrectly concluded no decade met the threshold.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent attempted to join reviews (purchase_id like "purchaseid_...") to books (book_id like "bookid_...") using direct equality (checking "if bid in book_year"), resulting in no matches and an empty decade set, so it incorrectly returned that no decade met the threshold.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
